description: Availability, functional correctness and performance monitoring for the EODC STAC API

panels.description:
One row per probe type. Red = any selected collection failing that probe.

• **root** — GET / — checks the STAC root endpoint responds with valid JSON
• **collections_list** — GET /collections — checks the API lists collections
• **collection_detail** — GET /collections/{id} — checks a specific collection loads
• **items_list** — GET /collections/{id}/items — checks the items endpoint returns features
• **search_post** — POST /search — checks the search index works and returns results
• **asset_fetch** — HEAD on asset URL — checks data.eodc.eu asset URLs are reachable
panels.title: Probe History — worst result across selected collections (green = OK, red = FAIL)
Collection Health — worst probe per collection
Failing Probes — currently broken (empty = all OK)
API Up / Down — dev and prod

options.content:
### What each functional test checks

| Test | What it does |
|------|--------------|
| **test_collections_not_empty** | GET /collections — verifies at least one collection exists |
| **test_known_item_exists** | GET /collections/{id}/items/{item_id} — verifies a known item can be fetched by ID |
| **test_search_with_collection_filter** | POST /search with collection filter — verifies search returns non-empty results |
| **test_pagination_no_overlap** | Fetches page 1 and page 2 of /items — verifies no item appears on both pages |
| **test_ingest_visible_delete** | Posts a test item via ingest API, waits up to 60 s for it to appear in /search, then deletes it — dev only |
| **test_asset_href_format** | Checks all asset hrefs in item responses use a valid URL scheme (http / https / s3) |

**Note:** Tests run against the first available collection unless `STAC_FUNCTIONAL_COLLECTION` is set. The Collection filter above does not affect these tests.
**Note:** Performance tests run against a fixed collection on-demand only. The **Collection** filter above does not affect this row. Trigger the performance workflow manually to update these values.
